nasb.text: The tombs were opened, and many bodies of the saints who had fallen asleep were raised;

esv.text: The tombs also were opened. And many bodies of the saints who had fallen asleep were raised,

cnv.text: 而且墳墓開了，許多睡了的聖徒的身體也復活了，

ccb.text: 坟墓打开，很多死去的圣徒复活过来。

csbs.text: 坟墓也开了，许多已睡了的圣徒的身体复活了。
